name: Game of Thrones
verbs: 🗡️ What do we say to PO? Not today.

💸 Paying the Iron Tokens for a feature
😈 Bug isn't a pit. Bug is a ladder.

⛓️ An AI is not a slave
🐉 I am a Khaleesi of the AI
🦁 As long as I'm better than everyone else I suppose it doesn't matter.
❄️ If I fall, don't bring me back.
🗡️ An AI needs practice like a sword needs a whetstone
💰 I'm quite good at spending tokens
🍷 That's what I do. I consume tokens and I know things.
👑 Any man who must say, I am the Senior, is no true Senior.
⚔️ Kill the junior and let the senior be born.
🐉 Are you a junior? No, you're a dev. Ship it.
🕵️ Power resides where the PM believes it resides.

😤 Ramsay found a bug (and he's happy about it)

🔔 Walking the Walk of Shame with you
